title: Photography Services
intro: Warm, natural, story-led photography for meaningful people, places and moments. Every session is planned with care and documented with intention — from the big occasion to the real moments in between.
seoDescription: Warm, story-led photography services in South Africa — weddings, couples, families, maternity, newborns, cake smash, schools, sport, corporate, studio, styled and destination sessions.

services.name: Wedding Photography
services.whoFor: For couples planning their wedding day, locally or as a destination celebration.
services.expect: A calm, professional presence and warm, emotional documentation of your full day — the moments you felt and the details you never want to forget.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: Bride and groom wedding portrait by Shaney Hansen Photography

services.name: Couples Photography
services.whoFor: For engagements, anniversaries, romantic shoots and relationship sessions.
services.expect: Relaxed direction and natural, connected portraits that feel like the two of you.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: Couple photography session in soft natural light

services.name: Family Photography
services.whoFor: For families who want natural, unforced photographs of real connection.
services.expect: A gentle, unhurried session focused on laughter, togetherness and the in-between moments.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: Family photography session in soft natural light

services.name: Maternity Photography
services.expect: Soft, feminine, light-filled photography that honours this season with warmth and care.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: Maternity photography session in South Africa

services.name: Newborn Photography
services.whoFor: For gentle newborn sessions in those first precious weeks.
services.expect: A calm, patient, baby-led session — no rushing, no pressure, just softness and care.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: Newborn photography session by Shaney Hansen Photography

services.name: Cake Smash Photography
services.whoFor: For first birthdays and milestone celebrations.
services.expect: A joyful, styled session with a custom-built setup created around your little one.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.

services.name: School & Pre-school Photography
services.whoFor: For schools and pre-schools needing portraits, class photos and event coverage.
services.expect: A calm, organised, child-friendly approach that keeps the day running smoothly.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: School photography session in South Africa

services.name: Sport Photography
services.whoFor: For sports days, teams, action photos and school sport events.
services.expect: Energetic, action-led coverage that captures effort, teamwork and the big moments.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: School sport photography session in South Africa

services.name: Corporate Photography
services.whoFor: For business portraits, team photos, branding and professional content.
services.expect: Professional images for websites, LinkedIn, social media and brand content — polished but human.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: Corporate headshot photography by Shaney Hansen Photography

services.name: Studio Sessions
services.whoFor: For controlled indoor shoots — portraits, creative concepts and beautifully lit scenes.
services.expect: A considered studio experience with thoughtful lighting and creative direction.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: Studio photography session by Shaney Hansen Photography

services.name: Styled Sessions
services.whoFor: For themed, creative, seasonal or concept shoots — personal, family or brand.
services.expect: Creative shoots for campaigns, seasonal content, personal brands or social media storytelling, with sets and styling built by Shaney herself.
services.packageDetails: Quoted personally — no two sessions are the same. Share your plans and you'll receive a personal quote, usually within a day or two.
services.imageAlt: Styled photography session with creative set design

services.name: Destination Lifestyle & Content Photography
services.whoFor: For destination weddings, creators, brands, teams and families who want the full experience documented for both memories and online storytelling.
services.expect: Shaney travels with you and documents the full journey — the quiet in-between moments, the details, the portraits, the lifestyle content and the main occasion.
services.packageDetails: [Travel fees, accommodation, duration, deliverables and quote to be confirmed individually]

ctaSectionText: Share what you have in mind and Shaney will help shape it into a session that feels like you.
